currentRecommendationTitle: Satisfy work package: source provenance and access policy

selectedCandidate.title: Satisfy work package: source provenance and access policy
selectedCandidate.summary: Use this coherent work package to close 4 related required checks.

workPackage.title: source provenance and access policy work package
workPackage.summary: Close 4 related required checks without changing checklist granularity.
acceptanceHints: Emit targeted_check_satisfaction rows for every targeted check.
Review ranking factors, validation flows, dashboard warnings/comparisons, and databank refresh/change history.

goalChecklist.title: Ranking factors expose source provenance and access-policy weighting
goalChecklist.description: The ranking engine must show which source-provenance and access-policy factors influenced each recommendation, including provider freshness, permitted access mode, and fallback behavior.

goalChecklist.title: Validation flows prove source access policy decisions
goalChecklist.description: Validation commands must emit machine-readable evidence that access policy decisions were checked for permitted providers, blocked live-only flows, and offline review behavior.

goalChecklist.title: Dashboard surfaces warnings and comparisons for sourced data
goalChecklist.description: The dashboard must expose user-visible source warnings, provider comparisons, stale data indicators, and unavailable-source limitations without hiding access-policy constraints.

goalChecklist.title: Databank refresh records change history and source provenance
goalChecklist.description: The databank refresh path must preserve source provenance, refresh timestamps, change history, and failure records so reviewers can inspect what changed and why.

recentAgentOutputs: Structured recommendation output was invalid, so the workflow used the deterministic fallback.
